description: Venmo payment integration for Standard Checkout — US merchants and buyers only

availability.note: Venmo is US-only. Both merchant and buyer must be US-based. Only USD is supported.

enable_funding.description: Enable Venmo via script tag parameter

initialization.code: const sdkInstance = await window.paypal.createInstance({ clientToken, components: ["venmo-payments"] })

eligibility_check.code: const eligible = await sdkInstance.findEligibleMethods({ currencyCode: "USD", countryCode: "US" })
eligibility_check.note: Must pass countryCode: 'US' for Venmo eligibility

button.element: Custom button with Venmo branding or standard button

order_creation.note: No special order payload needed. Standard create order with USD currency.

multi_method_setup.description: Combine PayPal and Venmo buttons with eligibility checking
flow: 4. Create separate payment sessions for each

best_practices: Always check Venmo eligibility before rendering the button
Always provide PayPal as fallback payment method
Use presentationMode 'auto' for optimal mobile experience
Venmo is mobile-first — expect most usage on mobile devices
Only offer Venmo when currency is USD
Test in sandbox with US buyer accounts
